records.m_Talk_ENG: Whew... I'm tired.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whew... I'm tired.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whew... I'm tired.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't think you really would carry me all the way here...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't think you really would carry me all the way here...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't think you really would carry me all the way here...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You all right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You all right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You all right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah... Don't worry. I'll be fine after a small break.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah... Don't worry. I'll be fine after a small break.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah... Don't worry. I'll be fine after a small break.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I don't see the others. Maybe they went off to investigate on their own?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I don't see the others. Maybe they went off to investigate on their own?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I don't see the others. Maybe they went off to investigate on their own?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I fell off a cliff... They could've taken the elevator back up, thinking I was dead.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I fell off a cliff... They could've taken the elevator back up, thinking I was dead.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I fell off a cliff... They could've taken the elevator back up, thinking I was dead.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No way! If they did, they're the worst!
records.m_Talk_DEU: No way! If they did, they're the worst!
records.m_Talk_FRA: No way! If they did, they're the worst!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, you did carry me a long way. No wonder you're hungry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, you did carry me a long way. No wonder you're hungry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, you did carry me a long way. No wonder you're hungry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm glad they left their supplies behind.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm glad they left their supplies behind.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm glad they left their supplies behind.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's instant beef stew. You okay with that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's instant beef stew. You okay with that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's instant beef stew. You okay with that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, thanks.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, thanks.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, thanks.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mmm...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mmm...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mmm...

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's wrong? Not enough?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's wrong? Not enough?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's wrong? Not enough?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, that's not it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, that's not it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, that's not it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Um... If it's fine with you, can I eat alone over there?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Um... If it's fine with you, can I eat alone over there?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Um... If it's fine with you, can I eat alone over there?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sure... But why?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sure... But why?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sure... But why?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not used to other people seeing me eat. Hehe...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not used to other people seeing me eat. Hehe...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not used to other people seeing me eat. Hehe...

records.m_SubTitle_ENG: G Wing. Hangar and medical facilities.
records.m_SubTitle_DEU: G Wing. Hangar and medical facilities.
records.m_SubTitle_FRA: G Wing. Hangar and medical facilities.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, you find anything there?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, you find anything there?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, you find anything there?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, just as we thought.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, just as we thought.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, just as we thought.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I found a Normalside Diving Bell. It's still in good shape.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I found a Normalside Diving Bell. It's still in good shape.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I found a Normalside Diving Bell. It's still in good shape.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nice! Let's get on that thing and get out of here!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nice! Let's get on that thing and get out of here!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Nice! Let's get on that thing and get out of here!

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. We'll need a lot of Eternium to get the Diving Bell's drive up and running.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. We'll need a lot of Eternium to get the Diving Bell's drive up and running.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. We'll need a lot of Eternium to get the Diving Bell's drive up and running.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Right now, it's out of juice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Right now, it's out of juice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Right now, it's out of juice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Goddammit. This place isn't a mine. How are we gonna find Eternium? Take down some C.O.s?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Goddammit. This place isn't a mine. How are we gonna find Eternium? Take down some C.O.s?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Goddammit. This place isn't a mine. How are we gonna find Eternium? Take down some C.O.s?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There must be a medical center nearby.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There must be a medical center nearby.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There must be a medical center nearby.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's hope there's some medical Eternium left there.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's hope there's some medical Eternium left there.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's hope there's some medical Eternium left there.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hm...? I just heard something from the ceiling...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hm...? I just heard something from the ceiling...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hm...? I just heard something from the ceiling...

records.m_Talk_ENG: What was that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What was that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What was that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's the Corruption ray detector the advance party had. It's telling us that the surrounding Corruption environment is undergoing rapid change.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's the Corruption ray detector the advance party had. It's telling us that the surrounding Corruption environment is undergoing rapid change.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's the Corruption ray detector the advance party had. It's telling us that the surrounding Corruption environment is undergoing rapid change.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Could there be C.O.s around?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Could there be C.O.s around?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Could there be C.O.s around?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. And very close.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. And very close.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. And very close.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They're coming.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They're coming.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They're coming.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Leave it to me. If anything pops out, I'll cut it down.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Leave it to me. If anything pops out, I'll cut it down.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Leave it to me. If anything pops out, I'll cut it down.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait... I just heard gunshots.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait... I just heard gunshots.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait... I just heard gunshots.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's from the corridor next to us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's from the corridor next to us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's from the corridor next to us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit. How long do we have to run for? We're gonna run out of bullets first!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dammit. How long do we have to run for? We're gonna run out of bullets first!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit. How long do we have to run for? We're gonna run out of bullets first!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, I see Captain over there.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, I see Captain over there.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, I see Captain over there.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? She's really alive?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? She's really alive?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? She's really alive?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What if she's turned like Giallo did? What if she attacks us?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What if she's turned like Giallo did? What if she attacks us?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What if she's turned like Giallo did? What if she attacks us?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We have to regroup if we want to live anyway.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We have to regroup if we want to live anyway.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We have to regroup if we want to live anyway.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kirk, Cuba!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kirk, Cuba!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kirk, Cuba!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Duck as soon as you cross the barricade!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Duck as soon as you cross the barricade!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Duck as soon as you cross the barricade!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ack... Crud! We're not gonna make it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ack... Crud! We're not gonna make it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ack... Crud! We're not gonna make it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Get down!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Get down!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Get down!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Welcome, everyone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Welcome, everyone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Welcome, everyone.

records.m_Talk_FRA: All the C.O.s... got sliced in half. Is this what a Counter can do?

records.m_Talk_ENG: More are coming. Get ready to block them!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Cover me. I'll get them from the front!

records.m_Talk_FRA: Cover me. I'll get them from the front!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's too dangerous. It's too dark to tell friendlies apart.

records.m_Talk_FRA: It's too dangerous. It's too dark to tell friendlies apart.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's fine! I don't mind if you shoot me!
